title: 3Sum
question:
Given an integer array nums, return all the unique triplets [[nums[i], nums[j], nums[k]]](http://vscodecontentref/0) such that:

i != j, j != k, and i != k
nums[i] + nums[j] + nums[k] == 0
The solution set must not contain duplicate triplets.

Example
Input: nums = [-1, 0, 1, 2, -1, -4]
Output: [[-1, -1, 2], [-1, 0, 1]]
